title: Plan with Claude Opus, Build with Kimi K2.6? LIVE Mixed-Provider Benchmark
summary: Cole Medin benchmarked mixed-provider LLM workflows using Opus and Kimi K2.6 by testing four different plan-and-build configurations against real GitHub issues. The Dark Factory experiment runs 12 PRs evaluated on seven dimensions to determine whether Opus or Kimi should handle planning versus implementation.
